name: Ground Chicken or Turkey with Peas (Murghi Ka Keema)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the ground chicken or turkey and cook until browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Drain excess fat if necessary.
4. Stir in peas and any desired seasonings.
5. Cook until the mixture is heated through and peas are tender.
6. Serve hot with rice or bread.
